title: Index Entry
description: A single ranked search result returned by the index over the curated mirror. Every entry MUST point back to the curated artifact and the original source URL (FR-013).

score.description: Higher is more relevant. Combines lexical + semantic components for hybrid queries.

matchKind.description: Which retrieval path produced the entry (FR-012, FR-014). 'entity' indicates the result was selected because of an attached entity match (SC-011).

snippet.description: Optional contextual snippet (Bulgarian or English) showing the match.

sourceUrl.description: Original portal URL — required by FR-013 for one-hop traceability.

curatedDatasetPath.description: Relative path under store/curated/ that the consumer can read for the full curated dataset record (FR-013).
